description.value:
Requirements Your last action was a Strike that critically hit a Large or larger creature.

People think you're just lucky, but in truth, you're simply always prepared to seize an opportunity when it presents itself, even in the face of seemingly impossible odds. Automatically [[/act shove]] the target 10 feet away from you. The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Off-Guard] until the end of your current turn.
